name: Turkey Fillets with Pine Nuts, Capers and Raisins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cool chicken broth or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the turkey fillets dry with paper towels.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Sear the turkey in batches over medium-high heat until golden brown on one side (about 1-2 minutes). Spray the remaining side, turn, and cook for an additional minute.
4. Hold seared turkey fillets on a warm plate and repeat with the remainder.
5. Add raisins, wine, capers, and chicken broth mixed with cornstarch to the pan. Stir constantly until slightly thickened.
6. Return turkey to the pan to heat through.
7. Serve turkey on individual plates, spooning sauce over the top, and sprinkle each portion with toasted pine nuts.
